package main

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for cmd_or_main_contains_domain_rules: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `main` or `cmd` packages that contain business-rule branches instead of wiring and startup concerns.
type CaseCmdOrMainContainsDomainRulesDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseCmdOrMainContainsDomainRulesModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseCmdOrMainContainsDomainRulesRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseCmdOrMainContainsDomainRulesModel
}

type CaseCmdOrMainContainsDomainRulesService struct {
    repo *CaseCmdOrMainContainsDomainRulesRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseCmdOrMainContainsDomainRulesAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeCmdOrMainContainsDomainRules(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseCmdOrMainContainsDomainRulesDTO) error {
    focus := "cmd_or_main_contains_domain"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    dto := CaseCmdOrMainContainsDomainRulesDTO{ID: input, Status: "active"}
    model := CaseCmdOrMainContainsDomainRulesModel{ID: dto.ID, TenantID: dto.TenantID, Status: dto.Status}
    _ = model
    cmd_main_contains_domain_rules_negative := map[string]int{"cmd": 1, "main": 2, "contains": 3, "domain": 4, "rules": 5}
    cmd_main_contains_domain_rules_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    cmd_negative_0 := cmd_main_contains_domain_rules_negative["cmd"] + len(input)
    _ = cmd_negative_0
    main_negative_1 := cmd_main_contains_domain_rules_negative["main"] + len(input)
    _ = main_negative_1
    contains_negative_2 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = contains_negative_2
    domain_negative_3 := CaseCmdOrMainContainsDomainRulesDTO{ID: input, Status: "domain"}
    _ = domain_negative_3
    rules_negative_4 := cmd_main_contains_domain_rules_negative["rules"] + len(input)
    _ = rules_negative_4
    return nil
}
